_comment: Immortal Astral Continent (仙罡大陆) — the apex cultivation realm of Renegade Immortal. Wang Lin breaks out of the sealed Cave World (containing Planet Suzaku) and ascends to this greater immortal realm in the final arcs. Divided into four canonical regions: (1) Immortal Court (仙庭) — opulent central highlands where ruling immortals dwell in sky-piercing palaces; (2) Mortal Dust Region (凡尘域) — humble dusty frontier where newly-ascended cultivators first arrive, wind-swept and sparse; (3) Daoist Peaks (道峰) — towering cold mountains wreathed in dao mist where Dao comprehenders meditate; (4) Karma Wastes (因果荒原) — desolate hot plains where karmic debt crystallizes, avoided by most. Biome noise parameters arrange these by continent/erosion/depth so the Court occupies the central highlands, Mortal Dust the frontier lowlands, Daoist Peaks the cold high weirdness, Karma Wastes the hot desolate weirdness. Prime Directive: all four regions exist objectively — Wang Lin arrived at a Continent that already had this geography; his cultivation determined what he could survive, not what existed.
